_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: We demonstrated detection of neurofibroma with LDCT and with additional testing this could suggest LDCT as a viable option for whole-body screening with reduced radiation exposure over standard CT, and as a fast acquisition (not requiring anesthesia) alternative to MR.
details: Demonstrated detection of neurofibroma with LDCT, suggesting LDCT as viable option for whole-body screening with reduced radiation exposure and as fast acquisition alternative to MR not requiring anesthesia
